title: Senior Investment Banker at RBL Bank

jsonLd.title: Senior Investment Banker at RBL Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with RBL Bank! We are hiring a Investment Banker for our Mysuru team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About RBL Bank:
RBL Bank is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RBL Bank!
